home_page.catalog_title: Choose the right car for your trip
home_page.catalog_description: Compare vehicles by class, engine type, and price, then open each page for full rates and specifications.
home_page.benefits_title: Why travelers choose AutoTerra in Chisinau
home_page.benefits_intro: We built the fleet for city trips, airport transfers, and longer rentals across Moldova without unnecessary friction.
home_page.benefit1_text: We prepare the car for your arrival in Chisinau and hand it over without extra waiting time.
home_page.benefit2_text: Rates are shown upfront by rental period, and economy cars come with a minimal deposit.
home_page.benefit3_text: Cars are maintained, insured, and backed by 24/7 support throughout the rental period.
home_page.seo_paragraph_1: If you need car rental in Chisinau without hidden terms, the site lets you filter the fleet by class and engine type, compare pricing for short and long rentals, and choose a vehicle for a specific route. Economy sedans work well for city driving, while roomier crossovers and premium models are available for family trips and business transfers.
home_page.seo_paragraph_2: AutoTerra has worked since 2016 and focuses on straightforward service: free airport delivery in Chisinau, transparent rental terms, 24/7 assistance, and better pricing for longer bookings. If you need long-term car hire in Moldova, you can review the 8-15 day and 16+ day rates immediately and pick the right option without extra back-and-forth.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What documents are needed for rental?
faq.a1: Passport and driver's license. Minimum age — 21 years, driving experience — at least 2 years.
faq.q2: Can I rent a car without a deposit?
faq.a2: The deposit depends on the vehicle class. For economy class, the deposit is minimal. Contact us for details.
faq.a3: Yes, we deliver the car to Chișinău airport and anywhere in the city for free.
faq.q4: What are the car rental prices?
faq.a4: Prices start from €25/day for economy class. The longer the rental period, the lower the daily rate. Premium cars from €45/day.
